description: Places a point in 3D space at explicit (x, y, z) coordinates within a g3d graph container. Takes explicit coordinates: point3d(G, x, y, z).
utility: Create a point at (x, y, z) in 3D space

alternates.description: Point at explicit (x, y, z) coordinates
Point with custom visual radius via stroke width
Point in spherical coordinates (r, theta, phi)
Point in cylindrical coordinates (r, theta, z)

examples.scenario: Origin point in 3D for scalar triple product
Point on surface with function evaluation
examples.expression: pt = point3d(G, x0, y0, f(x0, y0))

graph_1 = g3d(at(14,34), view(10.2, 16.2), range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5))
point_1 = point3d(graph_1, 3.7, 3.5, 0.0)
point_2 = point3d(graph_1, 1.2, -2.4, 0.0)
point_3 = point3d(graph_1, -2.7, -2.4, 0.0)

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P = point3d(G, 5, 45, 30, type(spherical))

examples.scenario: Spherical point with animated variables (r, theta, phi)
examples.expression:
var_r = variableanimator(at(3,6.7), "r", 4, 6, "r")
var_theta = variableanimator(at(2.9,13.1), "theta", 30, 200, "θ")
var_phi = variableanimator(at(3.1,22), "phi", 60, 140, "φ")
P = point3d(G, r, theta, phi, type(spherical))

examples.scenario: Hidden reference points on axes for angle arcs
examples.expression:
pXAxis = point3d(G, 2, 0, 0, defer())
pYAxis = point3d(G, 0, 2, 0, defer())
